oathauth-webauthn-javascript-required: JavaScript waa in lagu hawlgeliyaa biraawsarkaaga si loo isticmaalo furaha amniga.
oathauth-webauthn-ui-login-prompt: Isticmaal furaha amnigaaga ama raac tilmaamaha biraawsarkaaga.
oathauth-webauthn-error-browser-unsuppor: Biraawsarkan ma taageero xaqiijinta furaha amniga, ama kuma jiro adeeggan boggan.
oathauth-webauthn-error-auth-generic: Habka xaqiijinta waa la joojiyay. Fadlan mar kale bilow habka xaqiijinta.
oathauth-webauthn-error-reg-generic: Lama xaqiijin karin furahaaga. Fadlan mar kale bilow habka diiwaangelinta.
oathauth-webauthn-error-invalid-new-key: Furaha cusub ee uu soo celiyay module-ku ma aha nooca loo baahan yahay.
oathauth-webauthn-error-get-authinfo-fai: Lama soo heli karin macluumaadka xaqiijinta.
oathauth-webauthn-error-get-reginfo-fail: Lama soo heli karin macluumaadka diiwaangelinta.
oathauth-webauthn-module-description:
WebAuthn waxay ku jirtaa xaalad tijaabo ah. Hadda ma bixiso hab dib loogu soo ceshado qalabka xaqiijinta ee lumay ama dhaawacmay.

[https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/WebAuthn Wax badan ka baro WebAuthn]
oathauth-webauthn-authentication-info-he: Xogta xaqiijinta ee loo gudbiyay macmiilka si loo soo helo aqoonsiga
oathauth-webauthn-credential-help: Aqoonsiga isticmaalaha ee ku saleysan xogta xaqiijinta
